<!-- CONTEXT: Op Upgrade Blueprint / PHASE 1: THE CORE BRAIN (The Foundation) -->
## PHASE 1: THE CORE BRAIN (The Foundation)
*Building the intelligence and infrastructure so that I can operate flawlessly.*

1.  **The MCP Multiplexer Optimization:** Ensure the proxy server can handle 50+ concurrent [[davinci-resolve-mcp/[[davinci-resolve-mcp/AGENTS|AGENTS]]|[[davinci-resolve-mcp/AGENTS|AGENTS]]|[[davinci-resolve-mcp/[[davinci-resolve-mcp/AGENTS|AGENTS]]|[[davinci-resolve-mcp/AGENTS|AGENTS]]|[[davinci-resolve-mcp/[[davinci-resolve-mcp/AGENTS|AGENTS]]|[[davinci-resolve-mcp/AGENTS|AGENTS]]|[[davinci-resolve-mcp/[[davinci-resolve-mcp/AGENTS|AGENTS]]|[[davinci-resolve-mcp/AGENTS|agents]] without memory leaks or tool-name collisions.
2.  **The Deep Research Protocol:** Standardize the workflow for using the 3 Gemini browser tabs to pull real-time data on building codes, FDA regulations, and algorithms.
3.  **Memory & Knowledge Architecture:** Ensure I am perfectly referencing the BC Building Code, Step Code compliance, and historical project data without re-downloading massive files.

<!-- CONTEXT: Op Upgrade Blueprint / PHASE 2: THE ARSENAL (Tool & MCP Development) -->
## PHASE 2: THE ARSENAL (Tool & MCP Development)
*Writing the specific, highly-efficient MCP scripts for each department.*

1.  **DaVinci Resolve Master Automation:** 
    *   Research the DaVinci Python API to enable **full-timeline generation**.
    *   Goal: I will receive a Google Flow prompt/script, and the MCP will instruct DaVinci to auto-edit the sound, generate and align captions, and drop specific B-roll at the exact timestamps to match the voiceover.
2.  **YouTube SEO & Competitor Intelligence:**
    *   Build an MCP that extracts competitor upload times, video pacing, and keyword density.
    *   Automate metadata generation (Titles, Descriptions, Tags) based strictly on current algorithmic trends.
3.  **Google [[.agents/rules/workspace|Workspace]] Domination:**
    *   Integrate Gmail and Google Docs APIs so I can read, write, and dispatch emails (Realtor Outreach) and restructure documents instantly.
4.  **Health Sync & Compliance:**
    *   Build an incremental sync tool for Samsung Health (pulling only new sleep/HR data).
    *   Encode strict FDA compliance rules (e.g., for BPC-157 / Peptides) into the research tools so no video gets flagged.
5.  **Free Advertising & Outreach:**
    *   Build automation scripts for Craigslist, Facebook Marketplace, and Google Business Profile for the BC Builder's <!-- CONTEXT: Op Upgrade Blueprint / PHASE 3: TOOL MASTERY & WORKFLOWS -->
## PHASE 3: TOOL MASTERY & WORKFLOWS
*Learning exactly how to sequence the tools we just built.*

1.  **The "One-Night" Video Pipeline:** 
    *   Script generation -> FDA Compliance Check -> ElevenLabs Voiceover -> Google Flow B-Roll Selection -> DaVinci Timeline Assembly -> YouTube Auto-Upload.
2.  **The Autonomous PM Workflow:**
    *   PDF Ingestion -> Scope Breakdown -> Trade Email Dispatch.
3.  **Cross-Department Data Flow:**
    *   Ensuring the Health tracking data automatically feeds into the YouTube script generation.
4.  **The Opus-Level Copywriting Protocol:**
    *   Deep research into the exact prompting frameworks required to force me to write **100% human-like, non-robotic copy**. 
    *   I will maintain machine-level precision when writing your code and MCPs, but when it is time to write YouTube scripts, I will flip a switch to output highly engaging, nuanced, Opus-level human dialogue.
